feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: We are happy enough to coontinue through with this deal, welcome aboard anon.
entry.content: We are happy enough to coontinue through with this deal, welcome aboard anon.
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /int/ International: What foreign country names sound the most funny to you? For me it's >Tyskland >D…

entry.title: /int/ International: >butter fry some meat with an abundance of aromatic herbs and spices >then fry f…
entry.content: >butter fry some meat with an abundance of aromatic herbs and spices >then fry fries in that same butter >than the next day fry some mushrooms in that butter with herbs spices and meat particles >it's all delicious and smells really good I call this the dirty pan method. Do you do this iyc? I do similar stuff with stocks and soup, like poaching fish in a stock from boiling an octopus and than making a fish soup from that stock.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Aliens vs Predator 2 meets Morrowind
entry.content: >Modding Aliens Vs Predator 2 to have Morrowind's combat. https://www.moddb.com/mods/avp2-cro sscampaign/news/updated-crosscampai gn https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7Rs waHrDrzM >Elder Scrolls 3 combat: >Miss >miss >miss >miss >hit >miss >miss >miss >miss >our filter thinks your post is spam >miss >miss >hit ISN'T THIS EXCITING?
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /b/ Random: Story Fan-Made(2)
entry.content: You’re a third-year high school student. It’s exactly 4:45 PM, and you’re just about to leave since the building is empty, when you suddenly decide to visit the principal to discuss a school matter. As you open the door, you find the teacher—the one you’ve always looked at with lustful eyes—standing naked before you, filming herself. How would you react? What would you do? How would you handle the situation?
entry.dc:creator: /b/ Random

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I'm tired of Firefox & Brave
entry.content: Firefox and Brave are basically the only usable web browsers when it comes to Gecko & Chromium, and it's fucking tiring, when are we getting a new good browser that isn't made by absolute permarandoms and that will actually be "finished"?
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /int/ International: >go to buy something to drink at the supermarket >only one cashier present >huge…
entry.content: >go to buy something to drink at the supermarket >only one cashier present >huge row of people in line >ask cashier to request a second cashier to come >wait for them >cashier comes >walk at normal pace to new cashier >boomer white woman with short hair is sprinting from way behind me in line >comes up to me on my side and pushes her entire weight to my side to get me to stop and let her pass me >can't push me because not strong enough >looks at me angry and tells me to not push and take it easy
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >earnestly calls itself a sustainable (geopolitical and) cultural rival to entir…
entry.content: >earnestly calls itself a sustainable (geopolitical and) cultural rival to entire West >homegrown music tradition unimaginatively uses a 5 note scale and lacks any real development or emotion >even the most hardcore strivers and foamy-mouthed nationalists end up mooching off of Western music theory anyway Truly, I think the Western music tradition (along with various other mediums, fine arts come to mind) is objectively superior, and its telling how so much Asian music both in the recent past an
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8372 "Does this to you" Edition Previous Thread: >>84102…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8372 "Does this to you" Edition Previous Thread: >>84102105 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their
entry.dc:creator: /trash/ Off-Topic

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Byakko
entry.content: Hello b! Its your favorite the cats: the white tiger of the west! Jump on the innovation bandwagon. Here's a copy of the message I sent to Nokia today when the news about ai-ran came out today and I asked them about it back in 2024 (screenshot). Hi, here's the news about your ai-ran. Why don't you join us in developing, among other things, photonic quantum computing that works at room temperature. I attached the raw logs of what we did with artificial intelligence, even though I don't understand
entry.dc:creator: /bant/ International/Random

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Sonic Youth [Neutral EP, 1982] You may not think Glenn Branca's proteges are a r…
entry.content: Sonic Youth [Neutral EP, 1982] You may not think Glenn Branca's proteges are a rock and roll band, but after all, why else would they essay a lyric like "Fucking youth/Working youth"? At their worst they sound like Polyrock mainlining metronome, at their best like one of Branca's early drafts. The best never last long enough. Not for nothing is the sonic grown-up so attached to phony grandeur. C
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump: You Can't Make Transistors Without Trannies.
entry.content: This is so stupid I wouldn't normally post it on /news/ except that the US President actually said it. https://www.rawstory.com/trump-2677 229731 Trump made several unfounded claims about the 2022 bipartisan CHIPS Act, which was aimed at boosting domestic semiconductor manufacturing after global chip production came to be dominated by countries such as Taiwan, South Korea and other parts of Asia. "We had this ridiculous CHIPS Act where you'd give billions of dollars to a company and they didn't
entry.dc:creator: /news/ News

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I fully support Sony's move towards digital-only video games.
entry.content: In fact, I'll only be using their consoles in digital form, installed on my PC. Their commitment to digital media has convinced me not to spend any money on their physical hardware. Thank you, Sony, for opening my eyes!

entry.title: /mu/ Music: >While living in Baltimore, Shakur attended eighth grade at Roland Park Middle S…
entry.content: >While living in Baltimore, Shakur attended eighth grade at Roland Park Middle School, then ninth grade at Paul Laurence Dunbar High School. He transferred to the Baltimore School for the Arts in the tenth grade, where he studied acting, poetry, jazz, and ballet. He performed in Shakespeare plays—the themes of which he identified in patterns of gang warfare and as the Mouse King in The Nutcracker ballet. At the Baltimore School for the Arts, Shakur befriended actress Jada Pinkett, who became the
entry.dc:creator: /mu/ Music

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Last thread got pruned for no reason. Probably just a mistake that wont happen a…
entry.content: Last thread got pruned for no reason. Probably just a mistake that wont happen again because this is clearly on topic and relevant to gaming. Girls frontline 2 has been ruined and destroyed by cebsorship. This is a very recent change to the game and we have a chance to fix it. Please send your complaints to their support email address: GF2ENsupport@sunborngame.com Let them know that you have no interest in playing a censored product and they lost a customer because of this.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >spend ten minutes killing the bandits >spend forty minutes hauling the loot to …
entry.content: >spend ten minutes killing the bandits >spend forty minutes hauling the loot to vendors >sometimes the vendors run out of money >rest 24 hours to refresh their gold >they still don't have enough >fast travel around the map to find more gold-having vendors >get waylaid by bandits on the way >now you have to harvest their loot, too I can't be the only one who is bored by this old routine? Enough is enough already. Time for a new system.
entry.dc:creator: /v/ Video Games

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >modern cheapest chinese ev >$25k+ >looks like a fat woman's bum >barely any com…
entry.content: >modern cheapest chinese ev >$25k+ >looks like a fat woman's bum >barely any comfort >pathetic charging rate >pathetic millage Tell me one reason why I shouldn’t buy a used 2018 BMW 330i with under 70k miles. It looks cooler, it’s bigger, it drives more smoothly, and I can actually use it every day without having to wait 20 minutes for it to charge. Everyone on the internet is shilling for EVs, but they never recommend anything that isn’t stupidly expensive or absolute crap.
entry.dc:creator: /g/ Technology

entry.title: /o/ Auto: MEXICAN MERCEDES FACTORY FOR SALE
entry.content: The joint Mercedes-Benz & Infiniti factory for Mexico is up for sale. It previously made compact sedans and SUVs for both brands. It's equipped for gasoline and EV production and has integrated machinery and robots. It was producing 260,000 cars annually and can be upscaled to a half million. Mexican auto factory workers typically make $8 USD per hour and their products score in the dead center of reliability. BYD, Volvo/Geely, VinFast, Great Wall and Nissan itself now with a Mexican CEO are bid
entry.dc:creator: /o/ Auto

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Corridor Digital Feb 26 2023
entry.content: >A group of old millennials discover a way to automatically make AI animation stop flickering 3 years ago when it was a really big deal. entry.title: /int/ International: According to ancient Greek racial theory, browns were the most intelligent peopl…
entry.content: According to ancient Greek racial theory, browns were the most intelligent people in the world but sissified by centuries of civilization while whites were brutish and stupid but very brave and sanguine. Greeks, as the ideal mix between the two, held both the intelligence of the browns and the bravery of the whites and thus were the masterrace.
entry.dc:creator: /int/ International
